name: brainworm
description: A bookish, earth-toned xAI chat companion built with Next.js.
author: Dustin Whyte

scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage
scripts.electron: npm run build && npm run electron:prepare && electron electron/main.cjs
scripts.electron:pack: npm run build && npm run electron:prepare && electron-builder --dir
scripts.electron:dist: npm run build && npm run electron:prepare && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.electron:dist:linux: npm run build && npm run electron:prepare && electron-builder --linux AppImage --x64 --publish never
scripts.electron:dist:win: npm run build && npm run electron:prepare && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish never
scripts.electron:dist:mac: npm run build && npm run electron:prepare && electron-builder --mac --x64 --arm64 --publish never
scripts.electron:dist:release: npm run build && npm run electron:prepare && electron-builder --linux AppImage --x64 --publish never && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish never
